programs.title: The Goldbergs
programs.desc: Adam calls Brea, despite promising to keep distant so they can each establish themselves at college, sending Beverly into a tailspin.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Desperate for more income, Becky seeks a bartending position at Casita Bonita, causing major concern for Dan due to her struggle with alcoholism. Meanwhile, Darlene finally nears a decision between David and Ben; and Harris' new friend, Odessa, means new trouble.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Halloween brings nothing but horror for Jackie after she uncovers a shocking secret when trying to reopen the Lunch Box; Mary gets upset when a woman assumes she is adopted; Darlene continues to deal with her complicated love life.

programs.title: Bondi Vet
programs.sub_title: Update On Poppy, The Dog Without A Nose
programs.desc: Chris is answering a call for help from May Dodd, who runs an animal shelter for abandoned donkeys. One of her residents, Dusty, has developed a very strange walk. Can Chris save Dusty?

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Grieving Sisters Try to Keep It Friendly!/Vanishing Carpenter?!
programs.desc: Sisters have a dispute over their late mother's car in Judge Judy's court; a man wants a carpenter to return to his home and make repairs to a leaky door, but the latter claims the alleged damages are the fault of the client.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Nine Phones, One Deadbeat Ex-Lover?!/Unlicensed Teen Coming in Hot!/Help Me and My Five Kids?
programs.desc: A man who cheated on his lover says only four of his phones contributed to her bill; a 17-year-old broadsides a motorist then flees the scene; a woman has a strange way of showing gratitude after a stranger gives her a place to stay.
